reviews.comment:
Lugar tranquilo. Atencion bien y baños limpios. Al ser el shopp SERVICOMPRAS es chico y le faltan cosas como opciones al desayuno por ejemplo pero tiene lo basico. Van 4 estrellas por la tranquilidad del lugar y la buena atencion

(Translated by Google)
Quiet place. Good service and clean restrooms. Being a SERVICOMPRAS shopping center, it's small and lacks things like breakfast options, for example, but it has the basics. Four stars for the peacefulness and good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpZ3NtYURnEAE

Being the first station after many kilometers from San Luis to San Juan... they should have more products and improve their customer service and payment options.
